name: engineering-assurance-team
description: Engineering assurance team with code reviewer, architect, SRE, testing expert, and tech writer working together on complex engineering workflows

displayDescription.en: A team of 5 engineering specialists led by an Engineering Director: Code Reviewer (security/performance/correctness), Architect (system design/ADR), SRE Engineer (incident response/deploy), Testing Expert (test strategy/coverage), and Tech Writer (documentation/runbooks). Handles complex engineering workflows from code review to incident response.
displayDescription.zh: 由工程总监领导的 5 人工程专家团队：代码审查师（安全/性能/正确性）、架构师（系统设计/ADR）、SRE 工程师（事故响应/部署）、测试专家（测试策略/覆盖率）和技术文档师（文档/Runbook）。处理从代码审查到事故响应的复杂工程工作流。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me do a comprehensive engineering review of our system / Run a full incident response workflow
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我对系统进行全面工程审查 / 运行完整的事故响应流程
